mapper.sql: id , category_name, location, begin_time, end_time, cover, detail, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_category (id, category_name, location, begin_time, end_time, cover, detail, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beginTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_category
id,
category_name,
location,
begin_time,
end_time,
cover,
detail,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{beginTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{endTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{detail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_category
category_name = #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
location = #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
begin_time = #{beginTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cover = #{cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
detail = #{detail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_category set category_name = #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, location = #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, begin_time = #{beginTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cover = #{cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detail = #{detail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select count(id) from t_category
and category_name like concat('%',#{categoryName},'%')
order by create_time desc
